div1.entryFree: O'errule, absol. to prevail: then fate --s, that, one man holding troth, a million fail, Mids. III, 2, 92. Trans., == to prevail with: let me o. you now, LLL V, 2, 516. --d by prophecies, H4A IV, 4, 18. you shall o. my mind for once, R3 III, 1, 57. With to: so you will not o. me to a peace, Hml. IV, 7, 61.
